race.comment: AFTERBERNA (7) resumes after a spell of 12 weeks, closing last campaign with a fourth over 1200m at this track, beaten 3 lengths. Beaten in a photo the start before that, so better for the experience of previous campaigns and has been trialling well leading up to this. CIPHERED (12) is an interesting runner, a 2YO taking on the older horses, and his soft recent third placing in a Caulfield trial won by Resonant - 2nd at Bendigo last Sat - looks a good form reference. ATTUMA (8) settled well back and never came on when resuming last start, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths over 1200m at Cranbourne. Best figures measure up nicely. MY BONNIE LASSIE (10) will be better for the debut prep and moved well in a recent Sandown jumpout, so could be an improver.
